item.dc:creator: PieDestroya

item.title: Using a jetpack to climb a mountain
item.description: Pilot, a paramedic named Jamie Walsh, had only six days of training before he flew the suit up Helvellyn, the third highest peak in the UK. This impressive feat also demonstrates that the suit can be used in conditions a helicopter wouldn’t be able to fly in. Jamie was able to fly to the summit of Helvellyn in just 3.5 minutes compared to the current response time of 1 hour and 15 minutes. The program hopes to implement the Jet Suit Paramedic in summer 2022 to help those that get injured in the area.
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Game of Thrones - Book Description Portraits Part I - Artbreeder - credit: twitter@msbananaanna
item.description:
Arianne Martell: Early Twenties. "Arianne is buxom and beautiful, with olive skin, large dark eyes and long, thick black hair that falls in ringlets to the middle of her back. She has full lips, a husky voice, and round ripe breasts with huge dark nipples." - ASOIAF Wiki
Arya Stark: 9-12 years old. Has the Stark long face, grey eyes, and brown hair. Greatly resembles Aunt Lyanna according to Bran. Short hair depicted when she cut it to look like a boy. Bullied by Sansa for looking horse faced, but several characters have described her as pretty.
Lyanna Stark: Dead at age 16. Was considered to have a "wild" beauty to her; did not have the same delicate/refined/traditional beauty as Princess Elia. Described as a Tomboy, and has typical stark features of a long face, grey eyes, and brown hair. Slim.
Asha Greyjoy: Early-mid twenties. "Now in her mid-twenties, Asha is lean and long legged, with dark eyes and black hair cut short. Her face is thin, with a big, sharp nose, and wind-chafed skin. On her neck is a faded pink scar. Asha's brother, Theon Greyjoy, believes her hawk-like nose is too big and sharp for her small face, but he feels that her wicked smile makes up for it." - AWOIAF
Ned Stark: 35-36. Typical Stark features of long face, grey eyes, and brown hair. Ned has dark grey eyes that reflect his moods. He has a solemn face and his beard is beginning to grey, making him look older than his age. He is considered to be less handsome and shorter than his brother, Brandon Stark.
Brandon Stark (brother to Ned Stark): Dead at 20. Tall and handsome with grey eyes .
Brienne of Tarth: 17-20. "Brienne is unfeminine in appearance and is considered unattractive by Westerosi standards. She is tall, muscular, flat-chested, and ungainly, with shoulder-length brittle straw-colored hair and broad, coarse features that are covered in freckles. Brienne's teeth are prominent and crooked. Her mouth is wide, her lips are swollen, and her nose has been broken more than once. She has large, beautiful blue eyes." - AWOIAF
Catelyn Stark: Age 33-35. "Catelyn is beautiful, with fair skin, long auburn hair and blue eyes. She has long fingers and high cheekbones." - AWOIAF. Traditional Tully features and traditional beauty.
Sansa Stark: Age 11-14. Deep blue eyes, light auburn hair, with the Tully features of high cheekbones. Takes after her mother, but Catelyn believes Sansa will grow to become more beautiful than her. Considered by many characters to be fair looking, and Tyrion considers her to be as comely as Margaery Tyrell.
Jaime Lannister: ~31 years, green eyes, curled hair color of beaten gold, handsome, tall
Margaery Baratheon: Age 8-10. Golden hair, emerald eyes, and full lips. Delicate and beautiful.
Joffrey Baratheon: Age 11-14. Blonde curly hair, green eyes, pouty lips. Considered handsome. Jon thinks he looks like a girl. Probably has a punchable face, but that is just personal bias.
Cersei Lanister: Age 31-34. Twin to Jaime Lannister. "Cersei is a strikingly beautiful woman, with golden hair, emerald green eyes, fair skin, and a slender, graceful figure." - AWOIAF Note: Although she is considered by some to be the most beautiful of the seven kingdoms, her age was brought into consideration along with the prophecy that she will be replaced by a younger more beautiful queen.... so I tried to not make her beautiful but not as striking as described.
Daenerys Targaryen: Age 13-15. Daenerys has the classical Valyrian look; She has violet eyes, pale skin, and long, pale silver-gold hair. Daenerys is slender of frame. Daenerys has been described as fair, and beautiful.
Jaqen H'ghar: Young man, considered or noticed by woemn to be handsome with fine features. Long hair that is white on one side, and red on the other.
Jon Snow: Age 14-17. Has the most Stark features of the kids, with dark grey eyes, a long face, and dark brown hair.
Loras Tyrell: Age 15-18. Considered by many to be "beautiful" and "extremely handsome". Has big liquid gold eyes and brown lazy curls. Greatly resembles Margaery, according to Cersei (they are siblings).
Margaery Tyrell: Age 16-17. Thick, softly curling hair, with large brown eyes. Has a sweet/shy look to her. Considered by Tyrion to be as comely as Sansa Stark. Smooth unblemished skin.
Lysa Arry: Early 30s. Once beautiful, she has since grown thick and puffy due to many pregnancy issues. Has a small petulant mouth, and though she is younger than Catelyn, she looks older by a decade. Pale blue eyes, thick auburn hair. Her skin has become pale, which she tries to cover up with powder.
Melisandre: She is considered to be terribly beautiful, with unsettling red eyes and deep burnished copper hair. She has a heart shaped face. She's really old but looks young due to magic.
Littlefinger: Age 29-32. Short slender man with sharp features and a small pointed beard. Dark hair with threads of grey, and grey-green eyes. When he laughs or smiles, it does not reach his eyes.
Shiera Seastar: Age (dead). "Renowned as a beauty and seductress, with long Targaryen silver-gold hair, and a heart-shaped face. Although she had two mismatched eyes—one dark blue, the other bright green—it was said that the "defect" only enhanced her beauty." - AWIOAF
Syrio Forel: Age (?). Bald man with a beak nose.
Tyrion: ~24 yrs, mismatched green/black eyes, thin hair so blonde it's almost white, large jutting forehead, oversized head
Varys: Age 44-50. Bald, plump, effeminate, with powdered face (I'm assuming that means white powdered face + blush when searching up powdered faces historically?). Eyes are not specified in the book, but he is from Lys, so I assume he has purple eyes.
Ygritte: Age 19. Large pretty blue grey eyes. Crooked teeth, bright thick and shaggy red hair. Though considered to be beautiful among the wildlings. Jon does not think she is (but considers her smile to be pretty). He notices her eyes are too far apart. She has a short pug nose and a round face.
Gregor Clegane: Age 35-36. Gregor Clegane is a gigantic man, arguably the largest man in Westeros (surpassing all of the Baratheon brothers, Hodor and his own brother Sandor), with great arms, an ugly voice like stone breaking, grey eyes, brown hair and large shoulders.
Ser Jorah Mormont: Age 46ish. Jorah is a large middle-aged man, swarthy and hairy. He is black-bearded and balding, but still strong and fit. According to Dany: not particularly handsome. Ultimate friend-zoned.
Tywin Lannister: Age 58. Tall, slender, broad shouldered with shaved bald head, but keeps whiskers on the side of his face. He has pale green eyes with gold flecks in them.
Podrick: 13-15? Skinny, straight hair, thin neck.
item.dc:creator: msbananaanna

item.dc:creator: Stolf

item.title: SO. MANY. MANATEES.
item.description: "Hundreds of manatees congregate in one little canal at Satellite Beach, adjacent to DeSoto Park, every winter on particularly chilly nights. Because the canal is only a few feet deep, the manatees can be seen sleeping, stretching, snorking, lumbering over and beneath each other, and occasionally eating the plants along the canal's edge. Although the area is gated off for the safety and protection of the beloved manatees, visitors are still only a few yards away, and many bring chairs to sit and watch the wild manatees and their antics." Multiple marine manatee melee!
item.dc:creator: BrainTaffy

item.title: We Can’t Go On Together With Suspicious Memes v58
item.description:
I feel like it wasn’t about the Christianity
I sure as hell do
It’s not, imma make sure of it. I’m a teacher so my favorite thing to do when people bitch about CRT is just to say “ok just for that imma go teach it to some more kids bye” and they get so mad and there’s literally nothing they can do
Damn, the Song of Achilles really nailed this kid
Is anyone interested in being friends but doing enemy stuff
Containing yourself a always the right choice but it is never the fun choice
A shocking number of people piss me off considering I have the training to literally kill them and just choose not to
He chönk
No no, he’s got a point. Cervical bruising is never appreciated and like 70% of good Hetero sex is about fingers and tongue
It’s a slab of bacon making slime in the dark what do you expect
Target judged me.
Headcanon accepted
Body neutrality! The beach gon get whatever body you give it because bodies are made for experiencing the pleasures of life, the end
Your move transphobes! Also remember that parthenogenic thing. It’s important later.
I got no context so you get no context either
I love this feeling. Fire me bitch I dare u. (They do)(but it’s fine)
What a useless skill that turned out to be
It’s true
I hired this artist and I was like bruh is it ready yet and she sent me FIVE VOICE MESSAGES IN A ROW and I have TOLD her I’m hard of hearing AND she isn’t fluent in English and there’s a special circle in hell for people who do this to me without some sort of good reason
It’s hard. But you’ll feel better.
Monsters are cute!
My mother, everyone
This hit me. But also. Is it really a poem if it doesn’t rhyme
Some things are worth the effort. I don’t think I really understood this until I had a baby. I didn’t even know I was capable of loving anything this much. He’s worth all the effort.
Physical forms are bullshit
Annoyed by someone? TELL THEM. Hate someone? KILL THEM. feeling sad? BE HAPPY. (This chart makes a good point but is also stupid for a variety of reasons when you have mental illnesses or autism)
Facts
Someone make a dating site for autistics and/or asexuals and I’m all about it
God I hope so
Absurd. They’re worth at least twenty-five.
I love this cat
Mind your own business, ya lab coat wearing ass motherfucker
That’s just NASCAR??? As much as I’d like to see it I know if I were an ancient Roman I’d just stay home
What religion is this bc I’m in
She’s having way too much fun to actually be pumping
Psst. Wanna stick your pot hook in my bean hole
I’d eat it.
Harder to write tho. Sometimes you just want EVIL.
USA be like: ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Uterus owners are just made of tougher stuff
I get this a lot but I’m married so it makes me lol. Then people are like “ur husband is a simp” yeah well if you have someone to snuggle with at night and love you unconditionally and get as much sex as you want maybe being a simp ain’t so bad
So t r u e
Guilty. I have a baby box cutter on my keychain and I will whip it out ON A DIME. It’s what I used to slash that anti abortion sign!
I love him shut up
They’re dark chocolate so idk why they would but ok
Lizard tax! This is a Mediterranean gecko I found cornered by my cats. They’re parthenogenic, so I named her Sappho. If you don’t think that’s funny get out of my faceeeee
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: first cakeday post(after 5yrs) so here is my oldest favorite
item.description:
I found it fitting as I am sitting here finishing up some basic server maintenance for work, getting ready to call it for the weekend. Originally favorited the post by @icantthinkofausernamesohelpmegod from May '17 and after a little reverse image searching found the artist thanks to the post by @agony666 in April of '17 http://www.liannedias.com/web-comics if you dig the work(not me). Hope y'all are gearing up for a fun or relaxing or productive weekend, whatever you do stay safe, share a smile, and do your best to help the world be a better place
cat tax as is the law of the land; Batman being derp with his tongue out
Batman and Robin (aka little cat) lounging while we clean the room
item.dc:creator: GingerDaddyDom

item.title: It is my Cakeday, have a favorite
item.description: i'm sure many of you have seen this story many times before but it remains a powerful story and enjoyable read imo. There is by now also a comic version of this story but i found this one first in my favorites. I hope you enjoy :) The post i shamelessly stole this from: https://imgur.com/account/favorites/rY7A6Pc EDIT²: i found the comic version: https://imgur.com/gallery/5QseV0e (with, hopefully, working link this time) :D

item.dc:creator: ThePretentiousGentleman

item.title: I WON! I WON! I WON!
item.description: Edit: Wow everyone. I did not expect this response. I've been fighting for a long time for my daughter and for my family. I am way beyond burned out, but, today, there is a glimmer of hope. I struggle with complex PTSD because of all the shit that my ex and her husband have put me through over the years but I have been taking it one day at a time. I have a wonderful wife of 12 years that has been around since my daughter was born when we were just friends. She has my back no matter what and has pulled me through some rough patches and loves my daughter like her own. I really appreciate the kind words more than I can express. Judge called out their lies in the order, and it was so refreshing. I got a bit of a slap on the wrist as I should have went to the court to get an order for the vaccine, as our custody states that we need to make those decisions together. Though the judge did note that because of the vaccination, my daughter was able to do things she wouldn't have been able to such as attend school in person. So, just a warning to take it through the courts next time. I just couldn't stand by and let their twisted tiny minds hurt my kid. If any of you are facing something similar the best advice I can give is DOCUMENT DOCUMENT DOCUMENT. It saved my ass. Again, thank you so very much for the kind words. It is an incredible thing to feel vindicated after all this time. Background: My 14 year old daughter's mother and her husband are crazy controlling and have been abusive for years. They refuse to follow the order that was established for custody. They push me to make decisions that are against my daughters best interest. They have painted me out to have a victim complex. After years of this crap I finally had enough told him to fuck off and got my daughter vaccinated against their wishes (I have joint legal custody) as they are avid trumpers and think Fauci is a terrorist. My daughter's stepdad exploded and started screaming and yelling and calling me back excessively and threatening to hurt me. I told them I would no longer be communicating with him on the phone that everything would have to be done through email. I then called the police and file the police report. Held my ground since then. Fast forward, they had been pushing me again and I said if they want something different they need to bring it to the court and get an attorney. They were red hot that they had lost control so they did. They tried to take away all of my time except for every other weekend and let my daughter decide if she wanted to come to my house or if she wanted to hang out with her friends (literally said that in the language of the motion). My attorney argued that they were attempting to create a custody change while saying it was a minor parenting time change. Their motion was full of lies and double speak and the such and we were able to disprove everything because I had forced them to communicate with me in emails. They said many times how I wouldn't work with them but the email showed exactly the opposite. Two weeks ago we were told by the judge it would take 90 days to make the decision. Decision came back today, and we won. Years of taking the high road paid off and the judge called them out in her order. Today is a great day and I'm having champagne tonight!
item.dc:creator: daddymonk

item.title: The “Oldest Gold Of Mankind” was found in the Varna Necropolis, on The Bulgarian Black Sea Coast.
item.description: The “Oldest Gold Of Mankind” was found in the Varna Necropolis, on The Bulgarian Black Sea Coast. The Varna Necropolis (also known as Varna Cemetery) is a large burial site in the western industrial zone of Varna. It is internationally considered to be one of the key archaeological sites in world prehistory. It was at this site that the oldest worked gold treasure in the world was discovered, dating from 4,600 BC to 4,200 BC. A total of 294 graves dating between 4569-4340 BC have been discovered at Varna Necropolis so far, including three thousand gold artifacts. While there were many elite burials uncovered, there was one in particular that stood out among the rest – grave 43. Here, archaeologists uncovered the remains of a high-status male who appears to have been a ruler/leader of some kind. More gold was found within this burial than in the entire rest of the world in that period.
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007
